acquisition method: MS data were acquired with Top15 data-dependent MS/MS scan method (topN method).
cleavage agent: Proteins were digested with LysC and Trypsin overnight at 37°.
collision energy: fragmentation of precursor ions was performed by high-energy C-trap dissociation with a normalized collision energy of 27 eV.
fragmentation method: fragmentation of precursor ions was performed by high-energy C-trap dissociation.
ionization type: an EASY-nLC 1200 system coupled to a nanoelectrospray ion source.
labeling: proteomics analysis in bulk to identify the protein levels of the liver sample.
